title: Dreamy Garlicky Ukrainian Dried Cranberries Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring garlicky pillowy dumplings with dried cranberries, perfect for a hangover cure, made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients and grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, dried cranberries, garlic, mashed potato, onion, egg, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the dumplings to a preheated grill and cook for an additional 2 minutes on each side.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite toppings.
